---
title: "QR Code Generator"
description: "<style> @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');"
toc: false
show-reading-time: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }

.qr-container {
  max-width: 700px;
}

.qr-form label {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 16px;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  color: #555;
}

.qr-form input, .qr-form select, .qr-form textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 12px 14px;
  font-size: 15px;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  transition: border-color 0.2s;
}

.qr-form input:focus, .qr-form select:focus, .qr-form textarea:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: #2c7be5;
}

.qr-form select {
  appearance: auto;
}

.format-fields {
  display: none;
}

.format-fields.active {
  display: block;
}

/* Toggle rows (shared style for ECL and Version) */
.toggle-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0;
  margin-top: 6px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1.5px solid #e0e0e0;
}

.toggle-row label {
  flex: 1;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 8px 0;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin: 0;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  color: #666;
  background: #fafafa;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  border-right: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
}

.toggle-row label:last-child {
  border-right: none;
}

.toggle-row input[type="radio"] {
  display: none;
}

.toggle-row label:has(input:checked) {
  background: #2c7be5;
  color: white;
}

/* QR output grid */
#qr-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 28px;
  min-height: 200px;
  padding: 20px;
  border: 2px dashed #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #fcfcfc;
}

.qr-card {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 16px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid #eee;
}

.qr-card canvas {
  display: block;
  margin: 0 auto 8px;
  max-width: 100%;
  height: auto;
}

.qr-card .card-title {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #333;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.qr-card .card-info {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #888;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.qr-card .download-link {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #2c7be5;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.qr-card .download-link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

#qr-empty {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  text-align: center;
  color: #aaa;
  padding: 40px 0;
  font-size: 15px;
}

.checkbox-label {
  display: inline-flex !important;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-size: 14px !important;
  text-transform: none !important;
  letter-spacing: 0 !important;
  color: #333 !important;
  margin-top: 8px !important;
}

.checkbox-label input[type="checkbox"] {
  width: auto;
}
</style>

<p>Generate QR codes for different use cases. Everything runs in your browser, nothing is sent to a server.</p>

<div class="qr-container">
<div class="qr-form">

<label for="qr-format">Format</label>
<select id="qr-format">
  <option value="text">Plain Text / URL</option>
  <option value="wifi">WiFi Network</option>
  <option value="vcard">Contact (vCard)</option>
  <option value="email">Email</option>
  <option value="sms">SMS</option>
  <option value="phone">Phone Call</option>
</select>

<!-- Plain Text / URL -->
<div id="fields-text" class="format-fields active">
  <label for="input-text">Text or URL</label>
  <textarea id="input-text" rows="3" placeholder="https://example.com or any text..."></textarea>
</div>

<!-- WiFi -->
<div id="fields-wifi" class="format-fields">
  <label for="wifi-ssid">Network Name (SSID)</label>
  <input type="text" id="wifi-ssid" placeholder="MyWiFi" />
  <label for="wifi-pass">Password</label>
  <input type="text" id="wifi-pass" placeholder="password123" />
  <label for="wifi-enc">Encryption</label>
  <select id="wifi-enc">
    <option value="WPA">WPA/WPA2</option>
    <option value="WEP">WEP</option>
    <option value="nopass">None (open)</option>
  </select>
  <label class="checkbox-label"><input type="checkbox" id="wifi-hidden" /> Hidden network</label>
</div>

<!-- vCard -->
<div id="fields-vcard" class="format-fields">
  <label for="vcard-name">Full Name</label>
  <input type="text" id="vcard-name" placeholder="Jane Doe" />
  <label for="vcard-phone">Phone</label>
  <input type="text" id="vcard-phone" placeholder="+1234567890" />
  <label for="vcard-email">Email</label>
  <input type="text" id="vcard-email" placeholder="jane@example.com" />
  <label for="vcard-org">Organization</label>
  <input type="text" id="vcard-org" placeholder="Acme Inc." />
  <label for="vcard-url">Website</label>
  <input type="text" id="vcard-url" placeholder="https://example.com" />
</div>

<!-- Email -->
<div id="fields-email" class="format-fields">
  <label for="email-to">Recipient</label>
  <input type="text" id="email-to" placeholder="someone@example.com" />
  <label for="email-subject">Subject</label>
  <input type="text" id="email-subject" placeholder="Hello!" />
  <label for="email-body">Body</label>
  <textarea id="email-body" rows="3" placeholder="Message content..."></textarea>
</div>

<!-- SMS -->
<div id="fields-sms" class="format-fields">
  <label for="sms-number">Phone Number</label>
  <input type="text" id="sms-number" placeholder="+1234567890" />
  <label for="sms-body">Message</label>
  <textarea id="sms-body" rows="3" placeholder="Hey, check this out..."></textarea>
</div>

<!-- Phone -->
<div id="fields-phone" class="format-fields">
  <label for="phone-number">Phone Number</label>
  <input type="text" id="phone-number" placeholder="+1234567890" />
</div>

<label>Error Correction</label>
<div class="toggle-row">
  <label><input type="radio" name="ecl" value="L" />Low 7%</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ecl" value="M" checked />Medium 15%</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ecl" value="Q" />Quartile 25%</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ecl" value="H" />High 30%</label>
</div>

<label>Version (grid density)</label>
<div class="toggle-row">
  <label><input type="radio" name="ver" value="auto" checked />Auto</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ver" value="5" />V5</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ver" value="10" />V10</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ver" value="15" />V15</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ver" value="20" />V20</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ver" value="30" />V30</label>
  <label><input type="radio" name="ver" value="40" />V40</label>
</div>

</div>

<div id="qr-grid">
  <div id="qr-empty">Start typing to generate QR codes</div>
</div>
</div>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/qrcode/build/qrcode.min.js"></script>

<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof QRCode === 'undefined') {
    document.getElementById('qr-grid').innerHTML = '<div id="qr-empty" style="color:#dc3545;">Failed to load QR library. Try refreshing.</div>';
    return;
  }

  const formatSelect = document.getElementById('qr-format');
  const allFields = document.querySelectorAll('.format-fields');
  const grid = document.getElementById('qr-grid');
  const RENDER_SIZE = 300;

  formatSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
    allFields.forEach(function(f) { f.classList.remove('active'); });
    document.getElementById('fields-' + formatSelect.value).classList.add('active');
    generateAll();
  });

  function getPayload() {
    var format = formatSelect.value;
    switch (format) {
      case 'text':
        return document.getElementById('input-text').value;
      case 'wifi': {
        var ssid = document.getElementById('wifi-ssid').value;
        var pass = document.getElementById('wifi-pass').value;
        var enc = document.getElementById('wifi-enc').value;
        var hidden = document.getElementById('wifi-hidden').checked;
        if (!ssid) return '';
        return 'WIFI:T:' + enc + ';S:' + ssid + ';P:' + pass + ';H:' + (hidden ? 'true' : 'false') + ';;';
      }
      case 'vcard': {
        var name = document.getElementById('vcard-name').value;
        var phone = document.getElementById('vcard-phone').value;
        var email = document.getElementById('vcard-email').value;
        var org = document.getElementById('vcard-org').value;
        var url = document.getElementById('vcard-url').value;
        if (!name && !phone && !email) return '';
        var vcard = 'BEGIN:VCARD\nVERSION:3.0\n';
        if (name) vcard += 'FN:' + name + '\n';
        if (phone) vcard += 'TEL:' + phone + '\n';
        if (email) vcard += 'EMAIL:' + email + '\n';
        if (org) vcard += 'ORG:' + org + '\n';
        if (url) vcard += 'URL:' + url + '\n';
        vcard += 'END:VCARD';
        return vcard;
      }
      case 'email': {
        var to = document.getElementById('email-to').value;
        if (!to) return '';
        var subject = document.getElementById('email-subject').value;
        var body = document.getElementById('email-body').value;
        var mailto = 'mailto:' + to;
        var params = [];
        if (subject) params.push('subject=' + encodeURIComponent(subject));
        if (body) params.push('body=' + encodeURIComponent(body));
        if (params.length) mailto += '?' + params.join('&');
        return mailto;
      }
      case 'sms': {
        var number = document.getElementById('sms-number').value;
        if (!number) return '';
        var smsBody = document.getElementById('sms-body').value;
        return 'smsto:' + number + ':' + smsBody;
      }
      case 'phone': {
        var num = document.getElementById('phone-number').value;
        if (!num) return '';
        return 'tel:' + num;
      }
      default: return '';
    }
  }

  function getECL() {
    var checked = document.querySelector('input[name="ecl"]:checked');
    return checked ? checked.value : 'M';
  }

  function getVersion() {
    var checked = document.querySelector('input[name="ver"]:checked');
    return checked ? checked.value : 'auto';
  }

  function makeCard(payload, ecl, version, title, info) {
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'qr-card';

    var titleEl = document.createElement('div');
    titleEl.className = 'card-title';
    titleEl.textContent = title;
    card.appendChild(titleEl);

    var infoEl = document.createElement('div');
    infoEl.className = 'card-info';
    infoEl.textContent = info;
    card.appendChild(infoEl);

    var canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    card.appendChild(canvas);

    var opts = {
      width: RENDER_SIZE,
      errorCorrectionLevel: ecl,
      margin: 2
    };
    if (version !== 'auto') {
      opts.version = parseInt(version);
    }

    QRCode.toCanvas(canvas, payload, opts, function(error) {
      if (error) {
        infoEl.textContent = 'Data too large for this version';
        infoEl.style.color = '#dc3545';
        canvas.style.display = 'none';
      }
    });

    var dl = document.createElement('a');
    dl.className = 'download-link';
    dl.textContent = 'Download PNG';
    dl.addEventListener('click', function() {
      var link = document.createElement('a');
      link.download = 'qrcode-v' + version + '-' + ecl + '.png';
      link.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      link.click();
    });
    card.appendChild(dl);

    return card;
  }

  function generateAll() {
    var payload = getPayload();
    grid.innerHTML = '';

    if (!payload || !payload.trim()) {
      grid.innerHTML = '<div id="qr-empty">Start typing to generate QR codes</div>';
      return;
    }

    var ecl = getECL();
    var chosenVersion = getVersion();

    // Always show Auto (smallest version that fits)
    var autoCard = makeCard(payload, ecl, 'auto', 'Auto (smallest fit)', 'Minimum version for this data');
    grid.appendChild(autoCard);

    // Show chosen version if not auto
    if (chosenVersion !== 'auto') {
      var versionCard = makeCard(payload, ecl, chosenVersion, 'Version ' + chosenVersion, 'Grid: ' + (17 + 4 * parseInt(chosenVersion)) + 'x' + (17 + 4 * parseInt(chosenVersion)) + ' modules');
      grid.appendChild(versionCard);
    }
  }

  // Real-time generation
  document.querySelector('.qr-container').addEventListener('input', generateAll);
  document.querySelector('.qr-container').addEventListener('change', generateAll);
})();
</script>
```
